description: Ask any website's AI concierge a grounded question, and generate the embed to add one to a site.
name: io.github.nirholas/concierge-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves POST /api/concierge, and the origin the generated embed snippets point at. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the concierge answer call. The answer streams over a free-first LLM chain that can fail over across providers, so the default leaves room for one slow rung.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Timeout in milliseconds for fetching a page that concierge_ask grounds its answer in. Separate from the answer timeout so a slow site cannot consume the whole call.
environmentVariables.name: CONCIERGE_PAGE_TIMEOUT_MS

title: three.ws Concierge
